content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — Rating gate routes 4–5 star users to a `write-review` deep link while diverting unhappy users to a private feedback form (RatingGateView.swift:22-27), plus "rate us 5 stars!" copy in description.txt:2.
Pierre: Apple prohibits review gating that filters out negative feedback and manipulating ratings, and requires using `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview` rather than direct `write-review` deep links. Here happy users are funneled to the App Store while dissatisfied users are steered away, which is a textbook 5.6.1 dark pattern, and the "rate us 5 stars" language reinforces it. Replace the custom gate with the system review prompt and remove the star-rating manipulation and 5-star solicitation copy.
